title: AI agents for science benchmark reality check
why_it_matters: Scientific agents are highly aligned with SAGE/AIT, but they must be tested on reproducible tasks rather than promoted as generic AI scientists.
actionable_opportunity: Create an Ω-SciAgentArena-T benchmark track for Tristan agents using science-task scoring, failure memory, and reproducibility checks.

oak_check.risk: The briefing source must be verified before this becomes a real research direction; agent benchmarks may overstate open-ended scientific reasoning.
oak_check.limit: Treat as a benchmark opportunity, not proof of autonomous scientific discovery.
oak_check.falsification_route: Find the primary benchmark source, run a small baseline, and reject the item if tasks are not reproducible or relevant to Tristan workflows.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Do not claim AI scientist capability without measured task success, novelty, and reproducibility.

sources.title: Source verification required: scientific-agent benchmark mentioned in chat briefing

next_action: Verify the primary source, then create a small benchmark issue only if the tasks are reproducible.
business_funding_signal: Could become an internal OAKBench product for scientific-agent evaluation.
